NAVAREA XIX 14/15
NORWEGIAN SEA

1. IN THE PERIOD FROM FEBRUARY 19TH TO 20TH IT WILL BE LAUNCHED ROCKETS FROM ANDOEYA SPACE CENTER. THE LAUNCHING WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 08:00 HRS AND 19:00 HRS LOCAL TIME WITHIN THE ANNOUNCED PERIOD.

SEAGOING TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING TWO HAZARD AREAS:

AREA 1: 
A. 69-23.5N 15-56.0E
B. 69-18.0N 16-01.0E
C. 69-22.0N 15-49.0E
D. 69-23.5N 15-56.0E

AREA 2:
A. 69-36.0N 13-47.0E
B. 70-07.0N 16-09.0E
C. 70-24.0N 13-57.0E
D. 69-36.0N 13-47.0E

SEE WWW.ANDOYASPACA.NO FOR DAILY UPDATES 

2. NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS 02/15 REFERS
